dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9083 IH: State Emissions Authority Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Grothman (for himself, Mr. Tiffany, Mr. Moore of Alabama, Mr. Fulcher, Mr. Bost, Mr. Baird, Mr. Fitzgerald, and Mr. Joyce of Ohio) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To amend the Clean Air Act to repeal the mandatory requirements for State motor vehicle inspection and maintenance programs, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the State Emissions Authority Act of 2026.

section.header: Repeal of mandatory State motor vehicle inspection and maintenance requirements
section.text: The Clean Air Act (42 U.S.C. 7401 et seq.) is amended—

paragraph.text: in section 118 (42 U.S.C. 7418), by striking subsections (c) and (d);
paragraph.legis-comment: BMGautam: government vehicles and federal installations required to comply w/ I&M programs

subparagraph.text: in subsection (a)(2), by striking subparagraph (B) and redesignating subparagraph (C) as new subparagraph (B);
subparagraph.legis-comment: BMGautam: Requirement for States to submit SIP revisions with I&M program updates

clause.legis-comment: BMGautam: Limit on creditability of reductions for measures required under (a)(2)(B)- struck above

clause.text: by striking paragraph (4) and redesignating paragraph (5) as new paragraph (4);
clause.legis-comment: BMGautam: Requirement for States to submit SIP revisions with I&M program updates

clause.text: in the matter preceding paragraph (1), by striking Except as otherwise specified in paragraph (4) and inserting Except as otherwise specified in paragraph (3); and
by striking paragraph (3) and redesignating paragraphs (4) through (10) as new paragraphs (3) through (9), respectively; and
clause.legis-comment: BMGautam: Requirement for State enhanced vehicle inspection and maintenance program

subparagraph.text: in subsection (e), by striking paragaphs (6), (7) and (8) and inserting paragraphs (5), (6), and (7);

paragraph.text: in section 184(b)(1) (42 U.S.C. 7511c(b)(1)), by striking the following and all that follows through implementation and inserting implementation; and
paragraph.legis-comment: BMGautam: requires States to submit SIPs requiring compliance with enhanced vehicle and inspection maintenance programs

subparagraph.legis-comment: BMGautam: Savings clause, refers back to 182(a)(2)(B)
BMGautam: enhanced vehicle inspection and maintenance, refers back to 182(c)(3)

subparagraph.text: by redesignating paragraphs (5) and (7) as new paragraphs (4) and (5), respectively.
